en.extract:
The elegant honeyeater (Meliphaga cinereifrons) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is native to the Bird's Tail Peninsula (Papua New Guinea). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''elegant honeyeater''' ('''''Meliphaga cinereifrons''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]]. It is native to the [[Bird's Tail Peninsula]] (Papua New Guinea). Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
